languages.text: "Собираю военный совет. У моей свиты есть предложения?"
"I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"
languages.original_text: "Собираю военный совет. У моей свиты есть предложения?"

traits.locale_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"
"I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"
"I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

languages.text: 「私は戦争会議を招集している。私の側近は何か提案があるか？」
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: 「私は戦争会議を招集している。私の側近は何か提案があるか？」

languages.text: «Organizaré un consejo de guerra. ¿Qué sugerencias tiene mi séquito?».
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: «Organizaré un consejo de guerra. ¿Qué sugerencias tiene mi séquito?».

languages.text: “我要召开战争会议，诸位有何建议？”
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: “我要召开战争会议，诸位有何建议？”

languages.text: "Ich berufe einen Kriegsrat ein. Hat mein Gefolge irgendwelche Vorschläge?"
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: "Ich berufe einen Kriegsrat ein. Hat mein Gefolge irgendwelche Vorschläge?"

languages.text: "Savaş konseyimi topluyorum. Maiyetimin herhangi bir önerisi var mı?"
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: "Savaş konseyimi topluyorum. Maiyetimin herhangi bir önerisi var mı?"

languages.text: « Nous allons tenir un conseil de guerre. Mon entourage a-t-il des suggestions ? »
languages.original_text: "I am assembling a war council. Does my retinue have any suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons tenir un conseil de guerre. Mon entourage a-t-il des suggestions ? »
